name: node-is-glob
title: node-is-glob
summary: Node module to return true if a string is a glob or extglob
description:
Node module to return true if a string is a glob or extglob
Node module providing a function that returns true if a string contains
a glob or extglob. Extglobs add the expressive power of regular expressions
to globs patterns.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-is-glob because Node module to return true if a string is a glob or extglob.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-is-glob as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-is-glob with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-is-glob --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
